title: FrootAI Instruction Schema
description: Validates YAML frontmatter for .instructions.md files — coding standards and rules that auto-apply via glob patterns.

description.description: What this instruction enforces — the coding standard, framework convention, or cross-cutting concern.

applyTo.description: Glob pattern(s) for files this instruction applies to. Examples: '**/*.py' for Python, '**/*.bicep' for Bicep, '*' for all files. Comma-separated for multiple patterns.

waf.description: WAF pillars this instruction enforces. FrootAI's unique advantage: every coding standard is architecture-aligned.
